versions.version_description: This tab has a more correct and fuller sound. If you play along with the recording this sounds a lot closer than some of the other higher rated tabs.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
Here it is.. Hope you'll like it :) this is how I play it.. I  play it with a capo on the first..

[tab]Chords:    
     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C2[/ch]     [ch]G/F#[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]    [ch]Dsus[/ch]    [ch]Asus[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
